descriptions.Y: Pauli-Y — combined bit and phase flip
descriptions.Rx: Rx(θ) — rotation about the X axis
descriptions.Ry: Ry(θ) — rotation about the Y axis
descriptions.Rz: Rz(θ) — rotation about the Z axis
descriptions.control: Control — conditions the column's gate on |1⟩
descriptions.antiControl: Anti-control — conditions the column's gate on |0⟩

screenSummary.playArea: The play area is a quantum circuit grid where gates are placed on qubit wires. Panels show the resulting statevector, measurement probabilities, and per-qubit Bloch spheres.
screenSummary.controlArea: The controls choose a gate or tool, set the number of qubits, place gates on the circuit, undo and redo, load examples, step through the circuit, and export or import the circuit. A Reset All button returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Choose a gate and place it on the circuit grid, then watch the statevector and probabilities update.

controls.blochSphere: Bloch sphere — drag to rotate the qubit state
